landingPage.name: Cortex Landing
landingPage.description: Calm, private memory layer for AI — a dark, serif-led landing with a living memory-mesh hero, scroll-reveal motion, and an honest local-first access story.
landingPage.notes: Sections marked status 'built' exist today in src/app/home/page.tsx. Sections marked 'proposed' are blueprint slots adapted from the source template taxonomy for the next facelift pass. Cortex's calm aesthetic intentionally replaces high-energy template motifs (glitch text, collaborative cursors) with the Constellation memory-mesh and quiet scroll reveals.

sections.description: Sticky header with backdrop blur, anchor navigation, Cortex radial-burst logo mark, and a primary Launch app CTA.
features: Scroll-triggered backdrop blur over a translucent black bar
Anchor links: How it works, Features, Access, FAQ
Logo mark plus Expose-serif wordmark
Primary violet Launch app button
Hover color transition on nav links
Collapses to logo + CTA on mobile

sections.description: Full-viewport hero over the Constellation 'brain' memory mesh: a status pill, a serif headline with a violet italic accent, supporting copy, and dual CTAs.
features: Constellation canvas background (drifting primitives clustering into a brain)
Live status pill with pinging violet dot: 'Early access · local-first'
Serif headline 'You live it. Cortex remembers.' with violet italic emphasis
Subheading on memory, privacy, and cross-tool recall
Primary Launch app + secondary gold See how it works CTAs
Reassurance line: no account to start, data stays on device
Staggered scroll-reveal on every block

sections.description: Infinite wordmark marquee of the open infrastructure Cortex runs on, with an eyebrow label and edge fade mask.
features: Pure-CSS marquee, pauses on hover, honors reduced-motion
Edge gradient mask for a clean fade in/out
Eyebrow: 'The memory layer for AI, built on open infrastructure'
Serif wordmarks rather than third-party logo art

sections.description: Centered large-serif manifesto line — Cortex's signature, calm equivalent of a hype testimonial band.
features: Single large Expose-serif statement
Violet italic close
Generous vertical rhythm, reveal on scroll
sections.content: We carry more than we can hold in mind. Cortex remembers the rest — gently, and only for you.

sections.description: The Keep / Connect / Recall model as three numbered cards over a low-density Constellation drift.
features: Numbered markers 01–03 (a real sequence)
Three equal cards with hover border lift
Constellation drift background at reduced opacity
Section header with eyebrow, serif title, and intro

steps.title: Keep
steps.summary: Hand Cortex a thought, file, note, or link — it keeps only what matters, no folders or tags.

steps.title: Connect
steps.summary: It links what belongs together, tidies repeats, and draws the constellation of your memory.

steps.title: Recall
steps.summary: Ask in plain words from any tool — answers are grounded only in what you actually saved.

sections.description: Six capability cards in a responsive grid, each with a hand-drawn line icon, serif title, and description.
features: Responsive 1/2/3-column grid
Violet stroke icons
Hover border lift, equal-height cards
Per-row stagger on scroll reveal

featureCards.title: Memory that outlives the chat
featureCards.summary: Context persists across session, tool, and model.

featureCards.title: One brain behind every agent
featureCards.summary: MCP lets every tool share the same memory.

featureCards.title: Yours, on your device
featureCards.summary: Local-first by default; nothing leaves unless you choose.

featureCards.title: Shared, sealed, by name
featureCards.summary: Send a memory to a handle; encrypted before it leaves you.

featureCards.title: It gets sharper over time
featureCards.summary: Merges duplicates, corrects stale facts, prunes gently.

featureCards.title: Durable, and inspectable
featureCards.summary: Artifacts on storage you control — state you can see.

sections.description: A restrained trio of guarantees rather than vanity metrics — honest claims Cortex can stand behind.
features: Three large serif values with small labels
No fabricated user counts
Reveal with light stagger

stats.label: Your memory lives on your device by default
Anything shared is sealed before it leaves you
The same context across every tool you use

sections.description: 'One brain behind every agent' headline over the Cortex memory-map screenshot in a bordered frame.
features: Serif headline with violet italic accent
Framed product screenshot (/cortex-app.png)
Reveal on scroll for headline, copy, and image

sections.description: Bento grid of Cortex's real product surfaces, with one highlighted tile and varied sizing.
features: Two-row bento with mixed tile sizes
One highlighted tile (Memory Map) in violet
Loops tile accented with gold border
Color-coded badges [01]–[06]
Maps to surfaces that exist in src/components/cortex and src/app/api

bentoCards.title: MEMORY MAP
bentoCards.summary: A living constellation of what you've kept and how it connects.

bentoCards.title: CAPTURE
bentoCards.summary: Drop in notes, files, images, audio, and URLs from one composer.

bentoCards.title: ASK
bentoCards.summary: Question your memory in plain language, grounded in your sources.

bentoCards.title: STUDIO
bentoCards.summary: Compose with multiple models over your own context.

bentoCards.title: LOOPS
bentoCards.summary: Quiet agents that research, tidy, and plan — and check each other.

bentoCards.title: SHARING
bentoCards.summary: Seal-encrypted memory shared to a SuiNS handle.

sections.description: A two-column 'without / with Cortex' contrast on what happens to context over time.
features: Left column: context lost each session, repeated, siloed per tool
Right column: context kept, consolidated, portable, private
No named competitors — a before/after of memory itself

sections.description: Voices from early users. Placeholder copy until real, attributable quotes exist — do not ship fabricated names.
features: Quote cards with attribution
status: placeholder content pending real testimonials

sections.description: One honest plan: free during early access, local-first, with optional bring-your-own durable storage.
features: Single plan card, 'Free during early access'
Two-column included checklist with gold check marks
Optional add-on row: live durable storage (Walrus + Seal)
Dual CTA: Launch app + See how it works
No fabricated monthly price
included: Keep notes, files, thoughts and links
Recall in plain language, grounded in what you saved
Connect over MCP to the AI tools you already use
Local-first storage — nothing leaves your device by default
Self-improving memory: merges, corrects, and prunes
Pause anytime; nothing is ever quietly deleted

sections.description: Banded CTA on inspectable, open infrastructure with a gold outline action.
features: Split layout: statement left, action right
Eyebrow 'Built in the open'
Gold-outline Open the app button

sections.description: Accordion of four questions on what Cortex is, privacy, tool integration, and memory over time.
features: Radix accordion, single-open, collapsible
Hairline dividers, no underline on triggers
Reveal on scroll
items: Does it work with my AI tools?
How does it remember over time?

sections.description: Closing section over Constellation drift with a large serif line and a single Launch app button.
features: Headline 'Your memory has the answer. Just ask.'
Constellation drift background
Single primary CTA, reveal on scroll

sections.description: Footer with logo, a closing line, and a giant low-opacity Cortex serif watermark.
features: Logo + wordmark and closing statement
Oversized Cortex watermark at 5% opacity
Generous bottom padding

utilityComponents.description: IntersectionObserver wrapper that fades and rises children into view once, with a per-element delay for staggering.
utilityComponents.usage: Wraps nearly every content block across the landing

utilityComponents.description: Dependency-free canvas memory mesh: drifting geometric primitives that cluster into a brain ('brain') or drift loosely ('drift').
utilityComponents.usage: Hero, How it works, and final CTA backgrounds

utilityComponents.description: Radial-burst Cortex mark with white/black/color variants.
Reusable eyebrow + serif title + optional intro, extracted from the repeated header pattern.
utilityComponents.usage: How it works, Features, Bento, Access

motion.scrollReveal: opacity 0→1 + translateY(26px)→0, cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), 0.7s, IntersectionObserver-triggered, per-element delay
motion.marquee: 32s linear infinite translateX(-50%), pause on hover, edge-mask fade
motion.reducedMotion: all reveals and marquee disabled under prefers-reduced-motion
